example_tasks: Flag critical bugs for immediate hotfix
Highlight key deliverables for Q3 roadmap
Bookmark reference documentation for API integration
Identify milestone tasks for project launch
Star important emails from the client
Select featured portfolio pieces for website
Mark high-priority budget items for review
Rate vendor proposals on a 5-star scale
Pin essential design guidelines to the team wiki
Identify MVP features for the product launch
reasoning: The hollow star is a universally recognized symbol for priority, favorites, and bookmarking. In a task list, it serves as an excellent visual anchor to quickly scan for high-importance items, milestones, or starred resources.
